name: multi-session
description: Lets multiple pi sessions on the same machine discover each other and exchange messages. Each session registers in ${agentDir}/runtime/registry.json with a heartbeat; messages flow through per-session mailboxes in ${agentDir}/runtime/mailbox/.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --test test/protocol.test.ts test/registry.test.ts test/mailbox.test.ts test/smoke.test.ts

@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent.comments: Resolved from the user's globally-installed pi package. Set a concrete version range before publishing.
